title: Pulse Shaping for High-Fidelity Gates
description: Learn how pulse shapes affect gate fidelity, spectral content, and leakage. Master Gaussian, DRAG, and other pulse envelopes used in modern quantum processors to minimize errors.
learningObjectives: Explain why pulse shaping is necessary for high-fidelity quantum gates
Analyze the spectral content of different pulse envelopes and their bandwidth
Compare Gaussian, Gaussian square, and cosine pulse shapes
Understand the relationship between pulse bandwidth and leakage to non-computational states
Design pulse envelopes that balance gate speed with fidelity requirements
